description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a pointed nose cone painted green. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with visible hardpoints for external stores. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both swept back. The cockpit is positioned forward and enclosed with a clear canopy, and the landing gear is deployed in a tricycle configuration. The exterior is primarily metallic gray with some weathering, and there are visible insignia on the tail fin.
description: A metallic gray military jet with swept-back wings, a green nose cone, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Features include a single vertical tail fin and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed green nose cone, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the low-mounted swept wings, deployed landing gear, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, swept horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the landing gear, wing hardpoints, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and swept horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
